nasb.text: if you carefully observe all this commandment which I command you today, to love the Lord your God, and to walk in His ways always—then you shall add three more cities for yourself, besides these three.

esv.text: provided you are careful to keep all this commandment, which I command you today, by loving the Lord your God and by walking ever in his ways—then you shall add three other cities to these three,

cnv.text: 如果你謹守遵行我今日吩咐你的這一切誡命，愛耶和華你的　神，常常行他的道路，你就要在這三座城以外，再加添三座城；
